title: A Trip That Went Wrong
sentences: We had planned our holiday for months, so we were very excited.
Although the forecast looked bad, we decided to go anyway.
Our flight was delayed because of a storm near the airport.
We had to wait around for several hours in the terminal.
When we finally landed, we found out our luggage was lost.
Instead of giving up, we tried to stay positive.
The airline promised to deliver our bags the next day.
We checked into our hotel and went out to look around.
Although the trip started badly, it turned out to be memorable.
We ended up making new friends at the hotel.
By the end of the week, we had almost forgotten the problems.
